productDisplayName: W Women Gathered Design Off White Kurta
description: Composition Off white kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, with a mandarin collar and a slit neckline, pin tucks on the chest that flare out on the waist, and gathered design print Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this classic piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
